title: Updated EFSA Standard protocol for commodity risk assessment
author: Gardi, Ciro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Version #2 of the EFSA plant health standard protocol for commodity risk assessment and for pest list 
 In accordance with the EFSA Strategy 2027 outlining the need for fit-for-purpose protocols for EFSA generic scientific assessments, the EFSA Panel on Plant Health (PLH Panel) developed standard protocols to harmonise the problem formulation process and outputs for mandates addressing recurrent scientific questions. To develop a standard protocol for commodity risk assessment, the PLH Panel adapted the procedure and standard templates used for commodity risk assessment of high risk plants.
steps_raw:
Version #2 of the EFSA plant health standard protocol for commodity risk assessment and for pest list 
 In accordance with the EFSA Strategy 2027 outlining the need for fit-for-purpose protocols for EFSA generic scientific assessments, the EFSA Panel on Plant Health (PLH Panel) developed standard protocols to harmonise the problem formulation process and outputs for mandates addressing recurrent scientific questions. To develop a standard protocol for commodity risk assessment, the PLH Panel adapted the procedure and standard templates used for commodity risk assessment of high risk plants.
